be stretched or reduced to fit in the window.

Generally, it is recommended to keep sharing of IP addressed enabled to make connections faster and more often possible. Disabling IP address sharing will force all connections to pass messages through a TURN relay server, you can make P2P use one by adding one as an ICE candidate.

model.inheritance: Extension definition is the base record; JsExtension runtime metadata overrides execution fields.
